name: hi_flow
description: Feature-and-above solo+AI development methodology with product specs, project state, architecture gates, Behavior Registry, behavior migration, contract-preserving bug fixes, implementation plans, foundation wiring, and delivery rails.

interface.shortDescription: Behavior-first feature and architecture workflow for agentic development.
interface.longDescription: hi_flow guides feature-and-above solo+AI development from product intent through feature specs, Project State, Behavior Registry changes, behavior migration for existing projects, contract-preserving bug fixes, architecture gates, behavior-first implementation plans, plugin-internal stack baselines for project foundation wiring, and delivery setup. It is designed to coexist with Claude Code and Codex surfaces while keeping Superpowers as the recommended execution discipline.
defaultPrompt: Migrate an existing project to Behavior Registry
Plan a hi_flow bug fix for an Active Issue
